reviews.text:
My husband and I absolutely loved working with Michele and Mark! We did an engagement session with Michele, and then both she and Mark photographed our wedding. The photos are stunning. They captured exactly how our day felt. Our album is so beautiful and full of the warmth and joy we felt during our wedding.

I was initially nervous because my husband and I usually feel awkward in front of a camera. But Michele made us feel comfortable from the jump. She’s so kind and has a calm and grounding energy that makes the whole experience feel easy and natural. On the wedding day, she and Mark worked so well together. They were with us all day but we didn't even notice the camera outside of our posed photos.

I can’t recommend Once West enough!

Michele and Mark were one of the best choices we made for our wedding and our engagement photos. They were so easy to work with from the start, and on the wedding day they kept everything fun and completely stress-free.

They blended right in with our friends and family and managed to capture every moment from the ceremony to the dance floor. When we got our final photos back, we were blown away with how incredible they looked. As a couple that doesn't know how to pose for photos, Michele made the experience very comfortable and easy.

If you are looking for photographers who not only take amazing photos, but are genuine, kind, and great people to have on your wedding day, you wont regret choosing Once West.

Michele and Mark are simply AMAZING! I couldn't recommend them more!

My husband and I wanted photographers who could capture the joy and emotion of our wedding day, rather than many posed shots, and they absolutely delivered. When we look back at the photos, it's like reliving the day all over again.

Beyond the incredible photos, Michele is extremely responsive, organized, and fun to work with. From our first call, we felt we were in the best hands. She made the photography planning so easy - going into the wedding day, I truly wasn't worried about a thing. And that's all thanks to Michele!

We also did our engagement photos with Michele and felt completely at ease the entire time—we barely noticed the camera! The same was true on our wedding day, allowing us to enjoy every moment without worrying about how we looked. It was perfect!

We are thrilled with our photos—thank you, Once West! I would recommend these photographers to anyone and everyone!

We could not recommend Once West enough! Michele photographed our wedding this summer and the photos were incredible. We have loved reliving our special day through them. She is also incredibly kind and a pleasure to work with.

Working with Michelle and Mark was truly a delight. They were communicative, professional and very organized. Family and wedding party portraits went smoothly and quickly thanks to their well-crafted timeline, everyone knew where to be and when. For the rest of the day (Ketubah signing, ceremony, reception), Michelle and Mark managed to capture all of our favorite moments, and truly showed the essence of the wedding through the gallery they put together for us after. Editing was clean, pretty, and never over-done. Communication was always easy and simple, they are lovely people. I cannot recommend their services enough!!
